name: @merl1231/neofs-sdk-ts-rn
description: TypeScript SDK for NeoFS - React Native Edition

scripts.generate: protoc --plugin=./bin/protoc-gen-grpc-ts --grpc-ts_out=target=react-native:src/gen-grpc-react-native -I neofs-api neofs-api/accounting/service.proto neofs-api/accounting/types.proto neofs-api/acl/types.proto neofs-api/audit/types.proto neofs-api/container/service.proto neofs-api/container/types.proto neofs-api/link/types.proto neofs-api/lock/types.proto neofs-api/netmap/service.proto neofs-api/netmap/types.proto neofs-api/object/service.proto neofs-api/object/types.proto neofs-api/refs/types.proto neofs-api/reputation/service.proto neofs-api/reputation/types.proto neofs-api/session/service.proto neofs-api/session/types.proto neofs-api/status/types.proto neofs-api/storagegroup/types.proto neofs-api/subnet/types.proto neofs-api/tombstone/types.proto && sh scripts/sync-gen-grpc-index.sh
scripts.generate:all: sh scripts/ensure-protoc-gen-grpc-ts.sh && npm run generate:clean && npm run generate

author: merl111
